User.title: User
User.description: User profile information tracked for admin and personalization.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile photo.

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

Generation.title: Generation
Generation.description: A successfully generated image and its metadata.

userId.description: ID of the user who generated the image.

userEmail.description: Email of the user who generated the image.

prompt.description: The final prompt used for generation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the generation was saved.

Request.title: Request
Request.description: A log of an image generation request, including its status and performance.

userId.description: ID of the user who made the request.

enhancedPrompt.description: The AI-enhanced version of the prompt, if applicable.

error.description: Error message if the request failed.

durationMs.description: Time taken for generation in milliseconds.

Setting.title: Setting
Setting.description: Global application settings and engine configurations.

maintenanceMode.description: 0: Off, 1: Full Maintenance, 2: Soft Error Mode.

isBolAiEnhanceGlobalEnabled.description: Global toggle for prompt enhancement feature.

rateLimit.description: Requests per minute limit per user.

Example.title: Example
Example.description: An example image shown in the public gallery.

prompt.description: The prompt used for this example.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the example was added.

AIModel.title: AIModel
AIModel.description: Configuration for an AI model available in the Text AI chat.

id.description: Unique identifier for the model (e.g., gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the model was added.

ChatHistory.title: ChatHistory
ChatHistory.description: A log of a chat interaction between a user and an AI model.

userId.description: ID of the user who made the request.

hasFile.description: Whether the message included a file/image.

thinking.description: The AI's internal thinking process, if available.

model.description: The name of the model used.
